Container.Name: Klient
Container.Overview: Self-hosted client portal for freelancers and agencies. Manage projects, tasks, files, and client communication. Just start the container — no configuration needed. Default login: admin@klient.local / changeme123
Container.Description: Klient is a self-hosted client portal for freelancers and agencies. Zero configuration required — the container auto-generates all secrets and creates the database on first start. Default login: admin@klient.local / changeme123

Config.Name: Web UI Port
Config.Description: Port for the Klient web interface

Config.Name: NEXTAUTH_URL
Config.Description: (Optional) Public URL — only needed if using a reverse proxy with custom domain. Leave empty for default.

Config.Name: NEXTAUTH_SECRET
Config.Description: (Optional) Session secret — auto-generated on first start if left empty.
